ops.title: CI: docs build times out at gd-build 300s hard cap on main
ops.premise: The Documentation workflow (build-docs) goes red on cc-steer main because gd-build enforces a default 300s GD_BUILD_TIMEOUT while this repo's full API render legitimately takes ~285-340s. Not a content error — the build completes all 19 steps and is killed at step 19 (exit 124). Fix belongs in the docs workflow env (GD_BUILD_TIMEOUT), authored via the cc-guides fragment, not by hand-editing the managed docs.yml.
